actionCalls.description: Email Notification send to Approvers and Quote Owner whenever BluEdge Quote is converted to a new Order
actionCalls.name: BluEdge_Quote_Converted_To_An_Order
actionCalls.label: BluEdge Quote Converted To An Order

actionCalls.description: Send notification to Owner and Unit Approvers that a new Order is created
actionCalls.name: Unit_Quote_Converted_to_an_Order
actionCalls.label: Unit Quote Converted to an Order

assignments.description: assigns the new record type to the record
assignments.name: Assign_new_record_type
assignments.label: Assign new record type

assignments.description: assigns the owner to the be the quote owner
assignments.name: Assign_owner
assignments.label: Assign owner

value.stringValue: Invalid Due To Order Status Change

assignments.name: Assign_to_new_collection_to_update
assignments.label: Assign to new collection to update

assignments.description: assigns the total values summed to the original order
assignments.name: Assign_Totals_to_Orders_Fields
assignments.label: Assign Totals to Orders Fields

assignments.name: Collect_Whole_Order_Group_To_Update
assignments.label: Collect Whole Order Group To Update

assignments.name: Order_Shipment_To_Change_Log_Assignment
assignments.label: Order Shipment To Change Log Assignment

assignments.description: sums the amounts required for quote approval
assignments.name: Sum_The_Amounts
assignments.label: Sum The Amounts

decisions.name: NATT_Change_Log_Collection_not_equals_to_NULL
decisions.label: NATT Change Log Collection not equals to NULL

rules.name: Change_Log_Collection_not_equals_to_NULL
rules.label: Change Log Collection not equals to NULL

decisions.name: NATT_Order_Header_Change_Dealer_Comments
decisions.label: NATT Order Header Change - Dealer Comments

decisions.name: NATT_Order_Header_Change_End_Customer
decisions.label: NATT Order Header Change - End Customer

decisions.name: NATT_Order_Header_Change_Mark_For_Special_Delivery_Instructions
decisions.label: NATT Order Header Change - Mark For Special Delivery Instructions

rules.name: Order_Header_Change_Mark_For_Special_Delivery_Instructions
rules.label: Order Header Change - Mark For Special Delivery Instructions

decisions.name: NATT_Order_Header_Change_Market_Segments
decisions.label: NATT Order Header Change - Market Segments

decisions.description: this is a new units order
decisions.name: New_NATT_Order
decisions.label: New NATT Order

decisions.description: checks to see if any of the order fields are updated
decisions.name: Order_Field_is_Updated
decisions.label: Order Field is Updated

decisions.description: decide if an update of the record is needed
decisions.name: OrderRecordUpdateNeeded
decisions.label: OrderRecordUpdateNeeded?

decisions.description: checks to see if the owner is the quote owner.
decisions.name: Owner_is_not_Quote_onwner
decisions.label: Owner is not Quote onwner

decisions.name: Update_New_Order_Boomi_Status_OrderHeaderChange
decisions.label: Update New Order Boomi Status - OrderHeaderChange

rules.name: Update_Boomi_Status
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 9) AND (3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8)
rules.label: Update Boomi Status

decisions.description: updates the record type if the order is the type of amendment
decisions.name: Update_Record_Type
decisions.label: Update Record Type

decisions.description: These are used when setting amounts for discounts on quote for discount approval
decisions.name: Update_Total_Amount_Fields
decisions.label: Update Total Amount Fields

Flow.description: Handles updates on the Order Object - After Save

formulas.name: ChangeLogHistoryForMarketSegemnt
formulas.expression:
BLANKVALUE( {!TrackHistory} + '
NATT Change Type: Order Header Change
NATT Field: Market Segment
' + 'Original Value: ' + {!frmrecordPriorMarketSegment} + '
New Value: ' + {!frmrecordMarketSegment}, '
NATT Change Type: Order Header Change
NATT Field: Market Segment
' + 'Original Value: ' + {!frmrecordPriorMarketSegment} + '
New Value: ' + {!frmrecordMarketSegment} )

formulas.name: frmrecordMarketSegment
formulas.expression: CASE({!$Record.NATT_Market_Segment2__c}, "AEM", "APU/OEM", "ADY", "APU/Dry", "DEM", "Diesel/OEM", "HEM", "Heat/OEM", "TEM", "Trailer/OEM", "VEM", "Variable/OEM", "ADO", "APU/Distribution", "AFO", "APU/For Hire", "AGO", "APU/Dairy&Grocery", "ALO", "APU/Leasing", "ASO", "APU/Stock", "DDO", "Diesel/Distribution", "DFO", "Diesel/For Hire", "DGO", "Diesel/Dairy&Grocery", "DLO", "Diesel/Leasing", "DSO", "Diesel/Stock", "HBO", "Heat/Box Car", "HDO", "Heat/Distribution", "HFO", "Heat/For Hire", "HGO", "Heat/Dairy&Grocery", "HIO", "Heat/Intermodal", "HLO", "Heat/Leasing", "HSO", "Heat/Stock", "TBO", "Trailer/Box Car", "TDO", "Trailer/Distribution", "TFO", "Trailer/For Hire", "TGO", "Trailer/Dairy&Grocery", "TIO", "Trailer/Intermodal", "TLO", "Trailer/Leasing", "TSO", "Trailer/Stock", "VDO", "Variable/Distribution", "VFO", "Variable/For Hire", "VGO", "Variable/Dairy&Grocery", "VLO", "Variable/Leasing", "VSO", "Variable/Stock", "")

formulas.name: frmrecordPriorMarketSegment
formulas.expression: CASE({!$Record__Prior.NATT_Market_Segment2__c}, "AEM", "APU/OEM", "ADY", "APU/Dry", "DEM", "Diesel/OEM", "HEM", "Heat/OEM", "TEM", "Trailer/OEM", "VEM", "Variable/OEM", "ADO", "APU/Distribution", "AFO", "APU/For Hire", "AGO", "APU/Dairy&Grocery", "ALO", "APU/Leasing", "ASO", "APU/Stock", "DDO", "Diesel/Distribution", "DFO", "Diesel/For Hire", "DGO", "Diesel/Dairy&Grocery", "DLO", "Diesel/Leasing", "DSO", "Diesel/Stock", "HBO", "Heat/Box Car", "HDO", "Heat/Distribution", "HFO", "Heat/For Hire", "HGO", "Heat/Dairy&Grocery", "HIO", "Heat/Intermodal", "HLO", "Heat/Leasing", "HSO", "Heat/Stock", "TBO", "Trailer/Box Car", "TDO", "Trailer/Distribution", "TFO", "Trailer/For Hire", "TGO", "Trailer/Dairy&Grocery", "TIO", "Trailer/Intermodal", "TLO", "Trailer/Leasing", "TSO", "Trailer/Stock", "VDO", "Variable/Distribution", "VFO", "Variable/For Hire", "VGO", "Variable/Dairy&Grocery", "VLO", "Variable/Leasing", "VSO", "Variable/Stock", "")

formulas.name: frmrecordPriorShippingAddress
formulas.expression: "Shipping Street: " & {!$Record__Prior.ShippingStreet} & BR() & "Shipping City: " & {!$Record__Prior.ShippingCity} & BR() & "Shipping Stare/Province: " & {!$Record__Prior.ShippingState} & BR() & "Shipping Zip/Postal Code: " & {!$Record__Prior.ShippingPostalCode}

formulas.name: frmrecordShippingAddress
formulas.expression: "Shipping Street: " & {!$Record.ShippingStreet} & BR() & "Shipping City: " & {!$Record.ShippingCity} & BR() & "Shipping Stare/Province: " & {!$Record.ShippingState} & BR() & "Shipping Zip/Postal Code: " & {!$Record.ShippingPostalCode}

formulas.name: UpadateNatt_Change_Log_HistoryField
formulas.expression:
BLANKVALUE( {!TrackHistory} + '
NATT Change Type: Order Header Change
NATT Field: PO #
' + 'Original Value: ' + {!$Record__Prior.NATT_Purchase_Order__c} + '
New Value: ' + {!$Record.NATT_Purchase_Order__c}, '
NATT Change Type: Order Header Change
NATT Field: PO #
' + 'Original Value: ' + {!$Record__Prior.NATT_Purchase_Order__c} + '
New Value: ' + {!$Record.NATT_Purchase_Order__c} )

formulas.name: updatechangeLogDealerComments
formulas.expression:
BLANKVALUE( {!TrackHistory} + '
NATT Change Type: Order Header Change
NATT Field: Dealer Comments
' + 'Original Value: ' +TRIM({!PriorDealerComments}) + '
New Value: ' +TRIM({!DealerComments}), '
NATT Change Type: Order Header Change
NATT Field: Dealer Comments
' + 'Original Value: ' +TRIM({!PriorDealerComments}) + '
New Value: ' +TRIM({!DealerComments}) )

formulas.name: UpdateChangeLogforOrderHistoryStock
formulas.expression:
BLANKVALUE( {!TrackHistory} + '
NATT Change Type: Order Header Change
NATT Field: Stock
' + 'Original Value: ' + IF({!$Record__Prior.NATT_Stock__c}, "True", "False") + '
New Value: ' + IF({!$Record.NATT_Stock__c}, "True", "False"), '
NATT Change Type: Order Header Change
NATT Field: Stock
' + 'Original Value: ' + IF({!$Record__Prior.NATT_Stock__c}, "True", "False") + '
New Value: ' + IF({!$Record.NATT_Stock__c}, "True", "False") )

formulas.name: UpdateChangeLogHistoryForShipmentMethod
formulas.expression:
BLANKVALUE( {!TrackHistory} + '
NATT Change Type: Shipment Method
NATT Field: Shipment Method
' + 'Original Value: ' + {!frmrecordPriorShipmentMethod} + '
New Value: ' + {!frmRecordShipmentMethod}, '
NATT Change Type: Shipment Method
NATT Field: Shipment Method
' + 'Original Value: ' + {!frmrecordPriorShipmentMethod} + '
New Value: ' + {!frmRecordShipmentMethod})

formulas.name: UpdateEndcustomer
formulas.expression:
BLANKVALUE( {!TrackHistory} + '
NATT Change Type: Order Header Change
NATT Field: End Customer
' + 'Original Value: ' + {!$Record__Prior.NATT_End_Customer__r.Name} + '
New Value: ' + {!$Record.NATT_End_Customer__r.Name}, '
NATT Change Type: Order Header Change
NATT Field: End Customer
' + 'Original Value: ' + {!$Record__Prior.NATT_End_Customer__r.Name} + '
New Value: ' + {!$Record.NATT_End_Customer__r.Name} )

formulas.name: updatehistorytoshiptoaddress
formulas.expression:
BLANKVALUE( {!TrackHistory} + '
NATT Change Type: Ship-To
NATT Field: Shipping Address
' + 'Original Value: ' + {!frmrecordPriorShippingAddress} + '
New Value: ' + {!frmrecordShippingAddress}, '
NATT Change Type: Ship-To
NATT Field: Shipping Address
' + 'Original Value: ' + {!frmrecordPriorShippingAddress} + '
New Value: ' + {!frmrecordShippingAddress})

formulas.name: UpdateMarkforSpecialDelivery
formulas.expression:
BLANKVALUE( {!TrackHistory} + '
NATT Change Type: Order Header Change
NATT Field: Mark For Special Delivery Instructions
' + 'Original Value: ' + {!$Record__Prior.NATT_Mark_For_Special_Delivery_Instructi__c} + '
New Value: ' + {!$Record.NATT_Mark_For_Special_Delivery_Instructi__c}, '
NATT Change Type: Order Header Change
NATT Field: Mark For Special Delivery Instructions
' + 'Original Value: ' + {!$Record__Prior.NATT_Mark_For_Special_Delivery_Instructi__c} + '
New Value: ' + {!$Record.NATT_Mark_For_Special_Delivery_Instructi__c} )

Flow.label: NATT Order After Save Flow

loops.description: loops through order group to sum values for future quote approvals
loops.name: x1_Loop_through_Order_Group
loops.label: 1 Loop through Order Group

loops.description: loops through order group to sum values for future quote approvals
loops.name: x2_Loop_through_Order_Group
loops.label: 2 Loop through Order Group

value.stringValue: Invalid Due To Order Status Change

recordLookups.description: get the correct record type id
recordLookups.name: Get_Record_Type_ID
recordLookups.label: Get Record Type ID

recordLookups.description: Gets the whole group of orders including the original
recordLookups.name: Get_Whole_Order_Group
recordLookups.label: Get Whole Order Group

recordUpdates.description: updates the record that started the flow
recordUpdates.name: Update_The_Order
recordUpdates.label: Update The Order

variables.description: the sum of the NATT List amounts for all the orders in the group - ALL
variables.name: varTotalOrderListAmount

variables.description: the sum of the NATT List amounts for all the orders in the group (discountable only)
variables.name: varTotalOrderListAmountDisc

variables.description: the net amount of all the orders in the group summed - ALL
variables.name: varTotalOrderNetAmount

variables.description: the net amount of all the orders in the group summed (discountable only)
variables.name: varTotalOrderNetAmountDisc
